daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Events on the Horizon

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Transporter 16 Launch
top_events.description: A dedicated rideshare mission to deploy multiple small satellites into a sun-synchronous orbit.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 10-44
top_events.description: Deployment of 29 Starlink satellites for global internet coverage.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Potential aurora visibility at high latitudes due to G1 geomagnetic storm.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
